query_intent: Detect 2001 monthly store-sales outliers by brand/category/store where a month's sales deviate by more than 10% from that year's average monthly sales, using adjacent-month context.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate monthly store sales by category/brand/store/company for Dec-2000 through Jan-2002, and compute yearly average monthly sales plus sequential month rank.
Self-join monthly rows to prior and next month within the same category/brand/store/company to expose neighboring sales context.
Keep 2001 rows with nonzero average monthly sales and >10% relative deviation from that average, then order by deviation and next-month sales.
